title: zanthoxylum ekmanii
intro: Zanthoxylum ekmanii, also known as the Cuban prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are commonly found in various species of the Zanthoxylum genus. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum ekmanii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
